user.title: BWT Best Water Home
user.description: Paste an access token obtained from the BWT Best Water Home/AIDU OAuth helper. This MVP does not yet perform OAuth inside Home Assistant.

error.auth: BWT rejected the token. Generate a fresh access token and paste only the access token value (the Bearer prefix is optional).
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the BWT API.
error.no_products: No BWT products were returned for this account.

abort.already_configured: This BWT device is already configured.
